The PKGBUILD defines a binary package sourced from RStudio's official repository via a direct HTTPS link to `download1.rstudio.org`. The `prepare()`, `build()`, and `package()` functions are present but will not be executed due to `--noprepare` and `--nobuild`. The `source` array does not include git repositories or mutable URLs that could lead to uncontrolled code execution during fetch. All operations during the sourcing of this PKGBUILD are limited to declarations and safe string manipulation.

Therefore, running `makepkg --nobuild --nodeps --noprepare` and `makepkg --printsrcinfo` on this PKGBUILD is safe, as it will only download the verified upstream binary and parse static package metadata without executing any potentially harmful code.
</details>
<summary>

</summary>
</security_assessment>
